sections.title: Materials & Properties
sections.instructions: Listen to each sentence and type what you hear.

questions.sentence: The scarf is made of wool.
The crown is made of gold.
This table is made of wood.
The windows are made of glass.
The eraser is made of rubber.
These balls are made of plastic.
The wings are made of paper.
My ring is made of silver.
The bricks are very heavy.
Plastic is flexible. You can bend it.
Paper is very light.
The table is rigid. It doesn't bend.

sections.title: Making Suggestions
sections.instructions: Listen to the sentence and choose what you hear.

questions.sentence: Let's go to the cinema tonight.
options: Let's go to the cinema tonight.
Shall we go to the cinema tonight?
We could go to the cinema tonight.

questions.sentence: Shall we make a mask for the play?
options: Let's make a mask for the play.
Shall we make a mask for the play?
We could make a mask for the play.

questions.sentence: We could use blue paper for the sea.
options: Let's use blue paper for the sea.
Shall we use blue paper for the sea?
We could use blue paper for the sea.

questions.sentence: Let's design some props!
Shall we watch a film?
We could buy Julia a ring.
options: Shall we buy Julia a ring?
We could buy Julia a ring.

questions.sentence: Let's play hide and seek!
options: Shall we play hide and seek?
We could play hide and seek.

questions.sentence: Shall we have a party?
We could go swimming after school.
options: Shall we go swimming after school?
We could go swimming after school.

questions.sentence: Let's start the performance!

sections.title: Directions & Places
sections.instructions: Listen to each sentence and type what you hear.

questions.sentence: Go straight on and turn left at the traffic lights.
The bank is next to the supermarket.
Walk past the park and turn right.
The cinema is opposite the restaurant.
Go through the tunnel to reach the station.
The library is between the school and the post office.
Take the first turning on the left.
Walk along this street for about two hundred metres.
Go round the roundabout and take the second exit.
The hospital is at the end of this road.
The museum is next to the town hall.
Walk across the bridge to get to the park.

sections.title: Rules & Advice
sections.instructions: Listen to the sentence and choose what you hear.

questions.sentence: You must wear a school uniform.
options: You must wear a school uniform.
You should wear a school uniform.
You can't wear a school uniform.

questions.sentence: You should eat more fruit.
You mustn't use your phone in class.
options: You mustn't use your phone in class.
You should use your phone in class.
You must use your phone in class.

questions.sentence: Students must be quiet in the library.
options: Students should be quiet in the library.
Students can't be quiet in the library.
Students must be quiet in the library.

questions.sentence: You can't park here.
You should take an umbrella.
We have to get up early tomorrow.
options: We should get up early tomorrow.
We have to get up early tomorrow.
We can't get up early tomorrow.

questions.sentence: You mustn't swim in this lake.
options: You should swim in this lake.
You mustn't swim in this lake.
You must swim in this lake.

questions.sentence: Everyone must have a passport to travel abroad.
options: Everyone should have a passport to travel abroad.
Everyone can't have a passport to travel abroad.
Everyone must have a passport to travel abroad.

questions.sentence: You shouldn't be late for school.
options: You should be late for school.
You shouldn't be late for school.
You must be late for school.

sections.title: Technology
sections.instructions: Listen to each sentence and type what you hear.

questions.sentence: I need to download this file from the Internet.
Open your browser and type the address.
You need a password to log in.
She put all her books in her rucksack.
I read the novel on my e-book.
You need wifi to connect to the Internet.
Can you copy this text and paste it here?
Don't forget to bring your charger.
Use a search engine to find information online.
The keyboard and mouse are on the desk.

sections.title: Jobs
sections.instructions: Listen to each sentence and type what you hear.

questions.sentence: The waiter brought us our drinks.
She wants to be an actor when she grows up.
The cook made a delicious meal.
The driver took us to the airport.
The journalist wrote an article for the newspaper.
He is a photographer. He takes beautiful photos.
The artist painted a picture of the sunset.
The designer created a beautiful new dress.
The singer sang at the concert last night.
The acrobat performed amazing tricks at the circus.
My grandpa is a farmer. He grows vegetables.
The photographer uses a camera at work.

sections.title: Appearance & Personality
sections.instructions: Listen to the sentence and choose what you hear.

questions.sentence: What does he look like?
What is she like?
What does he like?
He's got short brown hair and blue eyes.
options: He's got short brown hair and blue eyes.

questions.sentence: She's very clever and interesting.
He likes swimming and cycling.
She is kind and friendly.
He is lazy and unfriendly.
She is popular and brave.
My brother is very clever.

sections.title: Zero Conditional
sections.instructions: Listen to each sentence and type what you hear.

questions.sentence: If you heat ice, it melts.
When water reaches one hundred degrees, it boils.
If you don't water a plant, it dies.
When the sun goes down, it gets dark.
If you study hard, you get good marks.
When it rains, the streets get wet.
If you eat too much chocolate, you feel sick.
When you mix water and oil, they don't mix.
If you press the button, the door opens.
When a baby is hungry, it cries.

sections.title: Passive Voice
sections.instructions: Listen to the sentence and choose what you hear.

questions.sentence: English is spoken in many countries.
options: English is spoken in many countries.
English is speaking in many countries.

questions.sentence: Cars are made in factories.
The letters are delivered every morning.
options: The letters are delivered every morning.
The letters is delivered every morning.

questions.sentence: Football is played all over the world.
options: Football is played all over the world.
Football plays all over the world.
Football are played all over the world.

questions.sentence: Rice is grown in China and India.
options: Rice is grown in China and India.
Rice grows in China and India.
Rice are grown in China and India.

questions.sentence: The rooms are cleaned every day.
options: The rooms are cleaned every day.
The rooms is cleaned every day.

questions.sentence: This book is read by millions of children.
options: This book is read by millions of children.
This book reads by millions of children.
This book are read by millions of children.

questions.sentence: Bananas are grown in tropical countries.
options: Bananas are grown in tropical countries.
Bananas is grown in tropical countries.

questions.sentence: The newspaper is printed every morning.
options: The newspaper is printed every morning.
The newspaper are printed every morning.

questions.sentence: Cheese is made from milk.
